# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

## [0.1.0] - 2026-03-22

### Added
- Initial release
- Core text density algorithm for content extraction
- Title extraction with multiple fallback strategies
- Publish time extraction with pattern matching
- Author extraction with heuristics
- Image URL extraction
- Noise element removal
- Custom XPath support for all extractors
- TypeScript support with full type definitions
- Basic examples and documentation
